programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 11

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 16

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 2

programme.desc: The Succubus (a.k.a. Chef's Mama): The boys discover that Chef has a new girl who has changed him from a free-spirited, soul-singing hipster to that of a mediocre, religious paper pusher. (S3, E03)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jakovasaurs: While camping, the boys discover the last two Jakovasaurs (a parody of Jar Jar Binks) on the planet. Will the townsfolk welcome them with open arms or find them very annoying? (S3, E04)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 5

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 6

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Action Bronson joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to showcase his wrestling moves with "Bronsonmania," watch some "White People Dancing,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 811

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: During an attempt to quit smoking, John attends a for-kids only pancake breakfast.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Jake gets married to a girl he just met. John buys a faux designer clock as a gift, which gets broken.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John helps a homeless man he discovered is a con artist when he learns the man is ill.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: John takes Reggies advice to be more sensitive with women. It helps at the office with Margaret, but backfires with a woman he is dating.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: John panics when he has to get an MRI, finally resorting to Valium to get through the claustrophobic test.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Reggie goes out to dinner with her abusive friend Sara and Sara's husband, Richard. She finds that she and Richard are attracted to each other.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: John tries to keep a casual love affair alive, while Bob tries to turn a found Super Bowl ring into his ticket to fame and fortune.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- John believes that Christmas is a phony time of the year. Instead of embracing the Christmas spirit, he uses getting robbed as vindication for his position.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: John is surprised when a patient is disappointed at the news that he's not terminally ill. Jake scams Bob in a Scrabble game.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Reggie meets Johns's friend Dan, who is recently divorced from an extraordinary, accomplished woman.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Becker and the crew decide to barter services office visits for food and services.

programme.title: Eclipse of the Heart
programme.desc: Lou returns from Vancouver with an admission that threatens to change the Heartland family forever.

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: The family strives to support a devastated Georgie when Lou and Peter are forced to tell her distressing news.

programme.title: All I Need Is You
programme.desc: Lou spearheads preparations for the big day while Amy throws herself into gentling a rescue horse.

programme.title: Written in Stone
programme.desc: To give Amy and Ty the wedding they really want, Lou struggles to deal with a slew of last minute hurdles

programme.title: Brave New World
programme.desc: While a dangerous bear lurks near Heartland, Amy and Georgie rescue an injured horse from the woods

programme.title: Begin Again
programme.desc: Ty prepares to celebrate an important milestone as he and Amy treat an abandoned horse.

programme.title: Riding for a Fall
programme.desc: Georgie gets pulled away by Lou and Peter who insist she focus on her schoolwork.

programme.title: Ties of the Earth
programme.desc: Jack grapples with the impending loss of a loyal and trusted friend.

programme.title: Back in the Saddle
programme.desc: Georgie guilts Jack into helping her train on a new horse in the hopes he will fall in love with the animal.

programme.title: Over and Out
programme.desc: Ty and Amy’s attempt to rescue an injured eagle in the mountains takes a dangerous turn.

programme.title: Fearless
programme.desc: Amy helps a Medieval jouster who was badly injured during a competition regain his confidence.

programme.title: Reckless Abandon
programme.desc: Amy’s attempts to help Georgie deal with an impending departure are complicated by Olivia.

programme.title: A Matter of Trust
programme.desc: Amy and Ty work together to determine why Caleb’s horse becomes ill during his treatment at Heartland.

programme.title: Raw S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It's the night before Jojo and Dylan's wedding, and Shane has lost the rings. Meanwhile, Jojo's transgression finally bubbles up to the surface.

programme.title: Raw S4 Ep. 6

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Geoff must decide whether to stay at Raw or return to Australia to take over the family restaurant.

programme.title: The Commander S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Commander Blake is assigned to investigate the bludgeoning death of an elderly woman as quickly and quietly as possible while DCI James' wife Zoe goes into labor.

programme.title: The Commander S5 Ep. 3

programme.title: The Commander S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Did Brian kill his own mother in an alcoholic haze? Who stole DCI James and Zoe's baby? Clare feels the heat of two high-profile cases with personal connections.

programme.title: The Commander S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Patient and persistent, Deputy Chief Constable Stephen Blackton (David O'Hara) has earned his nickname, "Blackdog,” as he is called in to re-open the investigation of the Lionel Cripps shooting.

programme.title: The Commander S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Graham Warner, the officer implicated in the Lionel Cripps shooting, is found dead in a park. Commander Blake continues to bury evidence of her relationship with James Lampton.

programme.title: The Commander S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Graham Warner, the officer implicated in the Lionel Cripps shooting, is found dead in a park. Commander Blake continues to bury evidence of her relationship with James Lampton.

programme.title: The Commander S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dutch DI Count Eric Van Hauten offers to help DCI Hedges with a new murder case. Commander Blake pledges to remain uninvolved, but will she be able to as the threat of more victims increases?

programme.title: The Commander S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Newly promoted, Commander Clare Blake (Amanda Burton) vows no cover-ups. When a previously convicted killer, James Lampton (Hugh Bonneville), gets released on parole, Blake's judgement is put to the test.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 33
programme.desc: An eccentric loser gets a new life from his guardian angel, but there is a price to keeping it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 34
programme.desc: A woman discovers that the floor of a department store, on which she bought a gold thimble, doesn't exist - and that her 'saleslady' is really a mannequin!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 35
programme.desc: A scientist arranges to have his human-looking robot pitch for the struggling local baseball team.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 36
programme.desc: A playwright makes characters come to life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A pilot of a downed WW II bomber comes to in the African desert and desperately tries to find out what happened to the rest of his crew.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A luckless couple stumbles upon fortune when a genie materializes from a bottle in their antique shop. The genie grants them four wishes but warns them, prophetically, to be careful what you wish for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Small time criminal Jackie Rhoades must face both his past and his conscience while waiting for his next assignment.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bartlett Finchley's paranoia about the machines around proves true.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Seeking refuge from a storm, traveler David Ellington comes upon a bizarre hermitage of monks, who have imprisoned a man who begs for his help. When David confronts the head monk Brother Jerome, he is told that the man is the devil, and David must decide

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A young woman lying in a hospital bed, her head wrapped in bandages, awaits the outcome of a surgical procedure performed by the State in a last-ditch attempt to make her look 'normal'.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: When three dum-dum crooks get ahold of a camera that takes pictures of the future, they set out to make a quick fortune with their new toy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a mysterious bag that gives out presents. With this bag, he sets out to fulfill his one wish - to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: At a prominent club in Washington, D.C., a socialite argues about whether it would be possible to change history by traveling back in time. When he leaves the club he finds himself in 1865, on the night that President Lincoln will be shot.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: A used car salesman buys a car that dooms him to tell only the truth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Gaining telepathic abilities when his coin lands on its edge bank clerk Hector B. Poole learns about the difference between other people's plans and fantasies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Passing through the sound barrier a commercial airliner inadvertently travels back in time.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Nurse Stacy Bradshaw tells Dr. Sloan about her skydiving escapades, and he politely turns down her extreme thrill-seeking invitation to come along.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dr. Travis catches Dr. Sloan in his office, settling in with a bowl of popcorn to watch a reality television show, "Hot House," a "Big Brother" and "Real World" type series.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Mark's friends Stanley and Tammy have decided to preview Tammy's new fashion line at their wedding.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: At a spiritual retreat, Beth Scarburough confronts Father Dominick about his failed friendship with her husband, Matt. She pleads for him to make amends with his former friend.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Cocky medical student, Hunter Koskov, coerces his classmates, Max and Jenny, to experiment with each other by inducing "death."

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Amanda does a guest spot as a nurse on the soap opera, where she serves as a medical consultant. Star actress Thalia faints during a scene and is rushed to the emergency room.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Julia Adams comes to Dr. Sloan for a check-up. She seems a little anxious. At the same time, a man comes running through the hospital and in one highly restricted lab, knocks over and breaks a test tube.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan questions old friend and newspaper baron Barclay about the security company.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Dr. Simon Hodiak, a noted cardiologist, is a gambling addict. When his bookie strong-arms him to repay his debt of $60,000, Simon sells his Porsche.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Maureen Tate is ogling over her nephew, Casey, with sister Grace. Maureen panics when there is a knock at the door, and the man's voice declares he is the police.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Old man Oscar Hemmings is being wheeled into surgery. As he is pushed through the halls, he has his lawyer, Mr. Bendix, take the names of doctors and workers in the hallway.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Journalist Ellen Sharp is meeting Phil Gwynn at a nightclub; apparently, he has a big scoop for her.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 18
programme.desc: While Amanda Bentley visits Martin, a good friend, and benefactor of a visiting Communist Chinese dance troupe, Tako, the star dancer drops dead.
